html:
Exclusive to:

Fish Cordon Bleu is a Warly-specific Meat Food Item cooked in the Portable Crock Pot, exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It requires two Frog Legs and Fishes with a total Fish value of 1.0 or higher, and takes 40 seconds to cook. Fillers cannot be Inedible.

When consumed, it immediately sets the player's Wetness to 0, and grants Wetness immunity for 5 minutes. It can protect the player from Rain and Acid Rain.

Recipe

x1.0

×2

Filler can not be Inedibles.

Example

×2

×2

×2

Trivia

  • Fish Cordon Bleu was added to Don't Starve Together in Warly's Character Update.
  • It is possible to make this dish using only drops from Merms, which would explain Wurt's scarred silence at the dish.
  • Despite not being able to eat it in game, Wurt has quotes for the buff starting and ending.
  • Characters have quotes when the buff starts.
  • Characters have quotes when the buff ends
By TypeBy Crock Pot Value

"frogfishbowl"
“Is that just... frogs stuffed inside a fish?”
–Wilson
“Woah, that's a ton of frogs.”
–Willow
“Food will make Wolfgang very strong!”
–Wolfgang
“It's actually... really good...”
–Wendy
“MY MINION IS VERY USEFUL”
–WX-78
“I'll happily volunteer to taste-test.”
–Wickerbottom
“I'm not one to turn my nose up at a meal.”
–Woodie
“At the end of the day, it's still frog.”
–Maxwell
“My ally is a göd amöng men.”
–Wigfrid
“Thanks Warly!”
–Webber
“I think I've outdone myself, given the available ingredients.”
–Warly
“Yum yums!”
–Wormwood
“Mmm! Love Warly's dishes.”
–Winona
“I'd rather have a nice fresh soul.”
–Wortox
“.........”
–Wurt
“Er... maybe Woby wants some.”
–Walter
“It tastes better than it looks.”
–Wanda
Fish Cordon Bleu is a Warly-specific Meat Food Item cooked in the Portable Crock Pot, exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It requires two Frog Legs and Fishes with a total Fish value of 1.0 or higher, and takes 40 seconds to cook. Fillers cannot be Inedible.
When consumed, it immediately sets the player's Wetness to 0, and grants Wetness immunity for 5 minutes. It can protect the player from Rain and Acid Rain.

×2
Filler can not be Inedibles.
Example[edit | edit source]

×2

Trivia[edit | edit source]
Fish Cordon Bleu was added to Don't Starve Together in Warly's Character Update.
It is possible to make this dish using only drops from Merms, which would explain Wurt's scarred silence at the dish.
Despite not being able to eat it in game, Wurt has quotes for the buff starting and ending.
Characters have quotes when the buff starts.
“I feel as dry as one of Wickerbottom's lectures!”
–Wilson
“Ha! Take that, water!”
–Willow
“Water will not bother Wolfgang!”
–Wolfgang
“At least I'll stay dry through my misery.”
–Wendy
“WATER: DEFEATED”
–WX-78
“I feel so pleasantly dry!”
–Wickerbottom
“I could stand under Niagara Falls and stay dry!”
–Woodie
“Finally, some respite from the dampness.”
–Maxwell
“A little water is nöthing tö a Viking!”
–Wigfrid
“Away, nasty water!”
–Webber
“Ah, nice and dry!”
–Warly
“No more wet!”
–Wormwood
“I've been waterproofed!”
–Winona
“There will be no wet fur smell for this imp! Hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“Glurph... drying up...”
–Wurt
“Nothing's going to rain on my parade! Because I'm waterproof, get it?”
–Walter
“I feel thoroughly waterproofed.”
–Wanda
Characters have quotes when the buff ends
“Looks like my dry spell is over.”
–Wilson
“Ugh. Back to watching out for puddles.”
–Willow
“Feels damp... Wolfgang hope not to catch cold.”
–Wolfgang
“Once more I'm left defenseless against the elements.”
–Wendy
“MOISTURE, MY OLD NEMESIS”
–WX-78
“Did I just feel a raindrop?”
–Wickerbottom
“I can feel the dampness creepin' back in.”
–Woodie
“I'm exposed to the elements!”
–Maxwell
“The tides have turned för the wetter.”
–Wigfrid
“Nooo! Spiders don't like the damp!”
–Webber
“Is it getting a bit soggy in here?”
–Warly
“Water back!”
–Wormwood
“I think I might be needin' an umbrella soon.”
–Winona
“Alas and alack, the dampness is back.”
–Wortox
“Yay!! Feel wetter already, flurp!”
–Wurt
“Oh well. It's good to stay hydrated anyway.”
–Walter
“Oh botheration, I was getting used to being waterproof.”
–Wanda

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Fish Cordon Bleu là một Loại Thực Phẩm Thịt đặc trưng của Warly được nấu trong Nồi Hầm Di Động, độc quyền cho Don't Starve Together. Nó yêu cầu hai Chân Ếch và Cá có tổng giá trị Cá từ 1,0 trở lên và mất 40 giây để nấu. Chất độn không thể không ăn được.

'''Fish Cordon Bleu''' is a [[Warly]]-specific [[Meat]] [[Food]] [[Item]] cooked in the [[Portable Crock Pot]], exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. It requires two [[Frog Legs]] and [[Fishes]] with a total Fish value of 1.0 or higher, and takes 40 seconds to cook. Fillers cannot be [[Inedible]].

When consumed, it immediately sets the player's [[Wetness]] to 0, and grants Wetness immunity for 5 minutes. It can protect the player from Rain and [[Acid Rain]].

== {{pic|32|Cookbook}} Recipe ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Fishes
|comparator1 = x
|count1 = 1.0
|item2 = Frog Leg
|count2 = 2
|item3 = Filler
|tool = Portable Crock Pot
|result = Fish Cordon Bleu
|note = Filler can not be [[Inedibles]].
}}

== Example ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Freshwater Fish
|count1 = 2
|item2 = Frog Leg
|count2 = 2
|tool = Portable Crock Pot
|result = Fish Cordon Bleu
}}
{{Recipe
|item1 = Fish Meat
|item2 = Frog Leg
|count2 = 2
|item3 = Ice
|tool = Portable Crock Pot
|result = Fish Cordon Bleu
}}
{{clear}}
== {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* Fish Cordon Bleu was added to ''Don't Starve Together'' in Warly's [[Don't Starve Together/Version History#July 25, 2019 - Warly Character Update|Character Update]].
*It is possible to make this dish using only drops from Merms, which would explain Wurt's scarred silence at the dish.
*Despite not being able to eat it in game, Wurt has quotes for the buff starting and ending.
*Characters have quotes when the buff starts.
